Registry / Terms / absolute error

absolute error

VIMOutdated — VIM 1993 G 18 #01638 · 2 instances

Authoritative definition

VIM 1993 · concept #3.10view ↗

result of a measurement minus a true value of the measurand

Outdated: Cites VIM 1993. Latest: VIM 2012.
  • VIM 1993 · #3.10
    result of a measurement minus a true value of the measurand

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH ✗ This term is NOT in VIM 2012. It may have been removed, renamed, or superseded by a different concept.
  2. MEDIUM 2 distinct definitions — harmonise.
  3. LOW 2 partially diverge.
